about.title: About the project
about.author: Author
about.subject: Subject
about.description1: Keep Track is a modern web application designed for efficient personal finance and budget management. The app provides a comprehensive solution for tracking income, expenses, and controlling spending through a flexible system of budgets and categories. Users can easily record transactions, organize them into custom categories, and analyze their spending via interactive charts and statistics.
about.description2: A central feature of the application is the Quick Add function, which allows users to create templates for frequently repeated transactions, speeding up recording and improving productivity. The app also offers the ability to split transactions, which is useful when sharing expenses or for more detailed analysis. All data is
about.description3: managed locally in the browser, ensuring user privacy and security.
about.statsIncome: Did you know that the sum of all your positive transactions is {{income}}?
about.statsExpenses: And the sum of all negative transactions is {{expenses}}!

⚠️WARNING!⚠️ 
Are you sure you want to generate random data?
This action will overwrite all existing transactions, generate 200 new random transactions, and cannot be undone.

import.title: Import transactions from bank
import.parseError: Failed to process the CSV file. Please check the format.
import.helpPrefix: 💡 Don't know how to get a CSV?
import.helpText: Log in to your internet banking (not the mobile app), go to transaction history, and select Export (choose CSV format separated by a semicolon or comma). E.g. in ČSOB, you can find this option in the account details.
import.summary: We found {{count}} transactions. Please check the assigned categories before saving.
import.uncategorizedWarning:
There are {{count}} transactions left without a selected category.

If you don't save them with a category now, they will be saved as "Unassigned".

Do you want to continue?
